channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken bench with nails sticking out, 31st May
item.description:
The bench has a plank removed showing exposed nails

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harper Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallet fly-tipping, 31st May
item.description:
Pallet fly-tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Birchdene Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree blocking Windus Walk, 31st May
item.description:
There is an overgrown tree blocking a large portion portion of windus walk. Apart from making it difficult for pedestrians and cyclists to use the path, the tree coverage attracts fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Firs avenue,bus stop CJ. Colney Hatch lane, 31st May
item.description:
No bin at this bus stop. Used to have bin last years . But now no bin , rubbish everywhere.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colney Hatch Lane, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped work top, 31st May
item.description:
Been here a week now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Valmar Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This rubbish has been smelling and rotting all weekend, 31st May
item.description:
Please collect immediately there are rats and fox eating this

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bridport Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in roadway, 31st May
item.description:
Possibly there overnight.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillingdon Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of pothole, garbage and no swings, 31st May
item.description:
The kids playground has a few potholes that have been here for a while. There’s frequently dog poos and other waste around and there has been no swings for a few weeks. The playground has been heavily neglected.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Green, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 31st May
item.description:
Dead fox discovered this morning.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tipped furniture, 31st May
item.description:
Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 178, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Scaffolding on road and pavement, 31st May
item.description:
Scaffolding is being used to block the road parking spaces and pavement. This makes it a nightmare to get past with bags, wheelchairs, prams. The scaffolding in the road is taking away two potential parking spots on an already difficult road to park
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rectory Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Upland x Underhill Rd SE22, 31st May
item.description:
Please clean.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 187, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Please can this streetlight be fixed so it doesn't come on during the day.

item.title: Fly tipping close to 106 Blackheath Road, 31st May
item.description:
Fly tipping close to 106 Blackheath Road and extra bags close tot the commercial waste bin. People are taking advantage of this spot since forever.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
